message:
Add uv installation step to CI workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+
       - name: Detect touched packages
         id: touched
         shell: bash
